data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional biz scoping for business-specific endpoints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding optional biz scoping for business-specific endpoints. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or records confirming the existence or state of these specific endpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for these records but lacks direct evidence of their implementation or status, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of optional biz scoping for business-specific endpoints being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for optional biz scoping.
